> **Note:** We recommend using the [structured bug report form](https://github.com/djunekz/tdoc/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) for a better experience.

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command: `tdoc ...`
2. Observe behavior
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs

```
Paste terminal output or error messages here.
```

## Environment

- **TDOC Version:** (run `tdoc version`)
- **Termux Version:**
- **Android Version:**
- **Device:**
- **Affected Command:** `tdoc ...`
- **Display Language:** (run `tdoc lang list`)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I am using the latest version of TDOC
- [ ] I have included version and environment details above
